---
name: Co-maintainer wanted (template — open one issue per candidate)
about: Use this if you would like to step up as a co-maintainer.
title: "co-maintainer: <your handle>"
labels: ["co-maintainer", "good first issue"]
assignees: hinanohart
---

Thanks for considering co-maintainership. Solo maintainer burnout is a real failure mode for projects like this, and a 4-week co-maintainer-recruitment KPI is part of the project's stated post-release plan.

Please tell us:

- **Your GitHub handle** and timezone (rough)
- **What pulled you in** — which part of the project (schema, SDK, tagger, adapters, docs) do you want to own?
- **Production use** — are you (or your team) using tetrad-lens, planning to, or just curious?
- **Time budget** — realistic estimate (hours/week) you can commit for the next 3 months.

We'll respond within 1 week. Co-maintainer onboarding includes:
- Push access to `main`
- Review rights on schema PRs (Layer 1 is the highest-risk surface)
- A short 1:1 to align on scope (CONTRIBUTING.md → "Project scope")
